name: im_channels
description: IM channel integration for Telegram and Discord. Each channel is essentially a bot on the IM platform that can interact with an Enconvo agent — when a message arrives, the bind agent automatically processes and replies. One agent can serve multiple channels, but each channel is bound to exactly one agent.
title: IM Channels
author: ysnows
